content: Verified upstream security work spans hook redirect SSRF prevention; first-party scoping of xAI memory bearer; plugin SHA pinning; managed-config anti-downgrade/replay/clock rollback; shell environment, redirects, sourced scripts, project hooks, sensitive edit targets, inline shell file access and env split-string gates; non-public web_fetch blocking; System-Reminder XML injection and remote LSP-trust RCE fixes; owner-only auth/MCP/crash/agent-id files; ambiguous MCP rejection; kubectl credential-plugin, ps environment-dump, rg --pre, and abused-safe-command RCE protections; inherited sandbox network restrictions; and Landlock without controlling TTY. These are P0 parity unless a bum test proves an equal-or-stronger implementation.
